query: We're launching our B2B product next month. Design a growth loop for us.
expected_behavior: Distinguishes between a funnel (one-way) and a loop (compounding) and designs a loop explicitly
Names the loop type: viral (invite-based) or engagement (habit-based)
Defines the Input, Trigger, Action, Reward, and Output of the loop
Connects the loop design to the AARRR stage it addresses
Includes a launch trajectory plan tied to a measurable benchmark at day 7 and day 30
